headline: Is Paychex, Inc. (PAYX) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is PAYX a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Paychex, Inc. on Valueinvestorsclub.com by Value1929. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on PAYX. Paychex, Inc.’s share was trading at $94.05 as of April 29th. PAYX’s trailing and forward P/E were 20.09 and 15.17 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Paychex, […]
